notes: Piece-level detection relies on filename substring appearing in Aria title/opus/work fields. Aria metadata is coarse (often only composer + form), so piece-level exact-match is not always possible.
Composer-level overlap is EXPECTED and not a leakage concern by itself — many compositions share a composer without being the same piece.
For definitive dedup, hash each Aria MIDI against ATEPP MIDI files. This script relies on metadata alone for speed.
Aria-MIDI-v1-deduped-ext claims internal dedup across the 371k corpus; overlap with an external ATEPP test set is not guaranteed absent.
